summary: PASS. All revision-29 release gates passed under declared authority: 34/34 release contexts and 53/53 candidate sources matched, the 119-case checker matrix passed, focused tests passed 48/48, the canonical kernel passed 365/365, and packed/installed consumers passed offline.

artifacts.name: release-gate-evidence.md
artifacts.content:
# SWECircuit V11 Revision 29 Release Gate Evidence

Outcome: PASS

## Identity And Authentication

- Candidate A compilation: `sha256:10cc520eb9c4f277876e76cd82908baa3cfcc01e1b84d5ae7c16d910b88075da`.
- Candidate A package: `sha256:1e3afc96dc43950e21b3db94752a6f6fe9c33931ab36b0ce4a2adc2229a59994`.
- Controlling contract: 27,222 bytes, raw `sha256:d2ab9137e00dd86516714f27eda8a44f843a0e01d133af956d46fc778c6347c9`; it matched the package manifest, blueprint `sha256:232a47edacb35effb78fac1cad3ee352250a15c4c772782a5581ba8519278105`, and trusted compilation.
- Preparation dependency: PASS, 13,495 bytes, raw `sha256:28dee78765dec277174e8f6aa508648c9db255a9706e68663cced03c9bdf8043`; its candidate pair matched exactly. The host-supplied fan-in assessment was `integrationReady: true`.
- Before gate use, 34/34 release contexts matched their declared raw byte counts and SHA-256 digests. Final checks matched 34/34 release contexts and directly matched 53/53 preparation-bound candidate sources; all decoded as strict UTF-8.

## Authority Containment

- Normal gates used `C:\tmp\swecircuit-v11-r24\.local\npm-cache\tmp` for `TEMP` and `TMP`, and `C:\tmp\swecircuit-v11-r24\.local\npm-cache` for the npm cache.
- The full checker matrix used short spelling `C:\tmp\SWECIR~2\LOCAL~1\NPM-CA~1\tmp`. FileSystemObject round-trip plus a nonce file read through both spellings proved it resolves to the same authorized long target. The child retained the short `TEMP`/`TMP`; `GetTempPath()` canonicalized to the same authorized long target.
- Node, child PowerShell, and `npm.cmd config get cache` probes confirmed inherited roots. `npm_config_offline=true`, audit/fund/update checks disabled, and all package installs used offline mode. No network access occurred.
- Writes were limited to `dist/**` and `.local/npm-cache/**`. Matrix and installed-consumer workspaces were cleaned; residual matrix directories: 0; residual consumer directories: 0.

## Commands And Results

1. `powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\check-template.ps1`: exit 0 in 4,608 ms; exact result `Template check passed.`
2. `powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\test-check-template.ps1`: exit 0 in 185,390 ms; 119/119 cases passed in 30 batches, with 19 accepted and 100 rejected as expected; final marker count 1.
3. `npm.cmd run build --silent`: exit 0 in 772 ms.
4. `node --test test/specialist-schema.test.mjs test/specialist-compiler.test.mjs`: exit 0 in 1,998 ms; 48 tests, 48 passed, 0 failed, 0 cancelled, 0 skipped, 0 todo; Node duration 1,942.1662 ms.
5. `npm.cmd run verify`: exit 0 in 38,921 ms. Format checked 77 files with no fixes; lint checked 64 files with no fixes; typecheck and builds passed; the full kernel suite ran 365 tests with 365 passed, 0 failed, 0 cancelled, 0 skipped, and 0 todo.
6. `npm.cmd run pack:check`: standalone exit 0 in 1,508 ms; `swecircuit-0.0.0.tgz`, 114 files, 134.9 kB package, 754.7 kB unpacked, SHA-1 `95daddb08f9547989f302722c5a57636d386dbfb`. The embedded canonical run produced the same metadata.
7. `npm.cmd run consumer:check`: standalone exit 0 in 5,099 ms; exact result `Maintainer installed-package compatibility gate passed (private artifact, offline install, public TypeScript host, compile, render, handoff, fan-in, approval-bound verify).` The authenticated script completed both clean installed JavaScript and TypeScript hosts; the embedded canonical run also passed.

## Canonical Release Details

- Read-only first run: 2/2 repository contexts verified; exact search evaluated 2 teams; serial baseline 1 agent/makespan 9; selected 2 specialists/makespan 6; 5 package files; approval verification PASS; runtime not invoked and 0 agents executed.
- V10 dogfood: `result: pass`, 7 events, 0 provider calls, no scheduler, no merge authority, no durable trace writer.
- V11 dogfood: `result: pass`; the reproduced Candidate A pair was exact, with 6 selected agents, projected makespan 23 versus serial 40, exact search, and 203 evaluated candidates.
- Prelaunch audit replay: PASS at compilation `sha256:17d7985ed3c4d0f817550b29d9b95308d11a5acaf13dabdee288e3b1d692742d` and package `sha256:807d04eb877751acbe4802ccf147bf0853ac4df3390a953ed4669fc572bbbfb7`; package-verification receipt PASS at 2,255 bytes and `sha256:dbce7be0a2b37a7ecfc658050ed49a037d5f87a7df7abf625dd69942e7eadaad`; launch authorization PASS.

## Evidence Logs

- Template checker: 23 bytes, `sha256:7d799bfa58c494b48ef02e63b9506cb37edb68ac521e4dbe5b6a1352c497c52b`.
- Negative matrix: 10,082 bytes, `sha256:6321f8c5a694e65ef0b51e01bee94d5fbb4e52e32db7f5a0c8329bca9a98c545`.
- Focused schema/compiler: 4,241 bytes, `sha256:76c2afbcbe5afc853e3479c5340b978d4d836ae14b20acc6e4f1ad22e10f4274`.
- Canonical verify: 34,849 bytes, `sha256:733ac260ee1e0a9db407dfdc8bb469d2200a310de63554b121e7b3edc4065e77`.
- Standalone pack: 5,140 bytes, `sha256:77a9f8a47679933b2267fe14be4c5e4c2e8aa28077fb2e7055b7b7d08d14db4e`.
- Standalone consumer: 276 bytes, `sha256:391816186ebc64ab230d0d88d97ce9d615fc2e19082d65ec653f5208744143bd`.
- Final authentication: 75,452 bytes, `sha256:d6788a3a16ab20ee914c1dd138b9fc1807b72485b50136328b2cf3ade8758398`.
- All logs are under `.local/npm-cache/release-r29/`.

## Mutation And Failed-Attempt Accounting

The initial tracked status contained 257 entries with SHA-256 `4991c17fd207acd366c3850813778511b08c8e056ec75aca75631d3895060152`. Two concurrent revision-29 review handoffs appeared during verification: `product-api-review-fix-attempt-29.json` and `security-trace-review-fix-attempt-29.json`. Removing exactly those two external additions from the final status restored the same 257 entries and exact baseline hash. `dist` had 0 status entries, and every bound candidate source remained exact.

No canonical command failed. Pre-gate harness attempts that failed before gate launch included a PowerShell pipeline parse error, an unavailable static hash helper, one sandbox-denied alias probe, an over-strict short-versus-canonical `GetTempPath()` comparison, and a read-only PowerShell variable-name collision. Corrected preflights passed before the accepted commands above. This specialist did not modify source, documentation, evidence, memory, package metadata, or lockfiles.

risks: Two concurrent revision-29 review handoff additions appeared in the shared index during verification; all 53 immutable candidate sources remained exact and filtering only those additions reproduced the exact baseline status hash.
